#1 JDG WICK. CSR BRENDA FIELDS. CLERK G. VAN HEST. ROBERT PERKISS IN AM FOR PLTF. THORN SMITH, SPECIAL APPEARING FOR HARRY DELIZONNA, PRESENT FOR DEFT. CASE CONT'D TO 2PM. 2PM DAVID COOK PRESENT WITH PLTF AND WITNESSES. ONLY THORN SMITH PRESENT FOR DEFT. COURT IMPOSED $250.00 SANCTIONS AGAINST DEFTS AND DEF COUNSEL. THE DECLARATION IS INSUFFICIENT PROOF. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE LACKED GOOD CAUSE AND INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO SUPPORT GRANT THEREOF. NOTWITHSTANDING THE ABOVE THE COURT FINDS IT TO BE IN THE INTEREST OF JUSTICE TO CONTINUE THE CASE TO 10/26/93 9AM IN DEPT 1.
